title: test_user_signup_with_valid_and_invalid_data
description: Verify user signup endpoint with valid data for different roles and invalid data such as missing fields, invalid email, short password, and duplicate user.

title: test_user_signin_with_correct_and_incorrect_credentials
description: Test user signin endpoint with correct credentials to receive JWT token, incorrect password, non-existent user, and admin access denial.

title: test_user_signout_and_token_invalidation
description: Verify user signout endpoint invalidates the JWT token and returns successful signout response.

title: test_get_current_authenticated_user_profile
description: Test retrieval of current authenticated user profile with valid JWT token and verify correct user information is returned.

title: test_email_verification_with_valid_and_invalid_codes
description: Verify email verification endpoint with valid 6-digit code, invalid code, expired code, and rate limiting for too many attempts.

title: test_resend_email_verification_code_with_cooldown
description: Test resend verification code endpoint to ensure code is sent successfully and cooldown period is enforced to prevent spamming.

title: test_update_user_profile_with_valid_and_invalid_data
description: Verify user profile update endpoint with valid changes to full_name and phone, and invalid attempts to change role or brand_id.

title: test_get_all_approved_brands_with_filters
description: Test retrieval of all approved brands with optional filters such as featured flag, search keyword, and limit on number of results.

title: test_create_brand_with_unique_name_and_owner_restriction
description: Verify brand creation endpoint allows brand owners to create a brand with a unique name and prevents duplicate brand names or multiple brands per user.

title: test_get_featured_brands_list
description: Test retrieval of all featured and approved brands to ensure only featured brands are returned.
